sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37663" key="e)coxe/teusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξοχέτ-ευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n37663.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drawing off,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αἵματος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:79" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.79</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
